name: DeckOfCards_new_deck
description: Create and shuffle a new deck of playing cards using the Deck of Cards API. Returns a deck_id that can be used with DeckOfCards_draw_cards to draw cards. Supports creating multiple decks (up to 20) shuffled together. Useful for card game simulations, probability exercises, randomization, and educational tools.

deck_count.description: Number of decks to shuffle together (default 1, max 20). Use multiple decks for games like Blackjack.

deck_id.description: Unique deck identifier to use with DeckOfCards_draw_cards (e.g., '3p40paa87x90')

remaining.description: Number of cards remaining in the deck (52 per deck)

shuffled.description: Whether the deck has been shuffled

name: DeckOfCards_draw_cards
description: Draw one or more cards from an existing deck using the Deck of Cards API. Requires a deck_id from DeckOfCards_new_deck. Returns drawn cards with their value, suit, code, and image URLs (PNG and SVG). Useful for card game simulations, probability demonstrations, and building card-based applications.

deck_id.description: The deck identifier from DeckOfCards_new_deck. Example: '3p40paa87x90'

count.description: Number of cards to draw (default 1). Cannot exceed remaining cards in the deck.

data.description: Draw result with cards and deck status

remaining.description: Number of cards remaining in the deck after this draw

code.description: Card code (e.g., 'AS' for Ace of Spades, 'KH' for King of Hearts)

images.description: Card image URLs in different formats
